steps.title: Identify what emphasizing similarity requires
steps.content: To emphasize a similarity, the answer must focus on what the birds have in common, not their differences. The notes include both a major difference (weight: 2.5 kg vs. 9 grams) and a commonality (location on Floreana).

steps.title: Match the goal to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice C explicitly states both birds share the characteristic of inhabiting Floreana, using both to highlight this commonality. The other three either stress their weight difference, isolate a single bird, or fail to show both birds in direct comparison. This matches choice C — C is correct.
